sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96992" key="stomatodiastoleu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στομᾰτοδιαστολεύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n96992.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">surgical instrument used to keep the mouth open</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:44:14:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44.14.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
